This review of 22 randomized controlled trials with a combined 1,995 participants examined several forms of intermittent fasting: time-restr... [REF:6].

A small 2025 study found that overweight participants who practiced two months of intermittent fasting were more likely to maintain the patt... [REF:7].

But there are caveats. “Meaningful weight loss only occurs if intermittent fasting is properly implemented without overcompensating ‘feast’ ... [REF:7].

**Key Findings**

- This review of 22 randomized controlled trials with a combined 1,995 participants examined several forms of intermittent fasting: time-restr... [REF:6]
- A small 2025 study found that overweight participants who practiced two months of intermittent fasting were more likely to maintain the patt... [REF:7]
- But there are caveats. “Meaningful weight loss only occurs if intermittent fasting is properly implemented without overcompensating ‘feast’ ... [REF:7]
